About Me

Driven by data,
powered by curiosity.

Engineering graduate (CGPA 8.97) with hands-on experience in Python, machine learning, and data analytics across 3 industry internships.

Final year of Bachelor of Engineering in Robotics & Automation at D.Y. Patil College of Engineering, Pune. My work spans security analytics, business intelligence, and product insights — each built with clean data pipelines and a focus on real outcomes.

From detecting anomalies in authentication logs to predicting customer churn and building real-time dashboards, I bring both analytical depth and software engineering thinking to every project.

Oracle-certified in Data Science & AI. National-level hackathon winner. Open to full-time roles in Data Science, Analytics, and Software Engineering.

Professional Experience

Where I've contributed.

Oct 2025 – Dec 2025
Soft Nexis Technology
Data Science Intern
  • Analyzed authentication logs using Python to identify abnormal login behavior — including off-hours access, repeated failures, and unusual IP activity — supporting the company's security risk detection workflow.
  • Engineered feature extraction modules to compute user-level and IP-level risk metrics such as login failure rates, session frequency, and access pattern deviations, feeding into a rule-based anomaly detection pipeline.
  • Performed end-to-end data preparation including cleaning, normalization, and transformation of raw log data to ensure accurate and consistent inputs for downstream risk analysis.
  • Documented analytical findings and structured risk insights into reports that helped the security team prioritize audit targets and refine detection thresholds.
Jul 2025 – Aug 2025
NoviTech Research and Development Pvt. Ltd.
Data Analyst Intern
  • Collected, cleaned, and preprocessed structured and unstructured business datasets using Python and Pandas — handling missing values, type inconsistencies, and duplicate records to ensure high data quality across pipelines.
  • Conducted exploratory data analysis to uncover trends, distribution patterns, and correlations across multiple datasets, converting raw figures into clear and actionable business observations.
  • Built summary reports and visual dashboards to communicate key analytical outputs to stakeholders, bridging the gap between technical findings and business decision-making.
  • Collaborated with the R&D team to define data collection strategies and contributed to improving pipeline efficiency for ongoing analytical and research projects.
Jun 2025 – Aug 2025
Smart Bridge Educational Services Pvt. Ltd.
Machine Learning Intern
  • Applied supervised machine learning techniques — including classification and regression — on real-world healthcare datasets to build predictive models and derive clinically meaningful insights.
  • Performed extensive exploratory data analysis using Python libraries (Pandas, Matplotlib, Seaborn) to visualize feature distributions, identify correlations, and guide informed model design decisions.
  • Preprocessed and transformed healthcare data by handling missing values, encoding categorical variables, and scaling features to prepare clean inputs for model training and evaluation.
  • Evaluated model performance using accuracy, precision, recall, and F1-score, iterating on feature selection to improve predictive outcomes on held-out test datasets.
Featured Projects

Built with purpose.

01
Authentication Log Analysis & Security Risk Intelligence

Analyzed 5,000+ authentication log records to detect abnormal login patterns by computing user-level and IP-level metrics such as login failure rates and access frequency. Built a rule-based risk scoring system to flag suspicious behavior and categorize threats into 3 risk levels.

PythonMySQLPandasSecurity Analytics
View on GitHub
02
Customer Churn Prediction & Retention Analysis

Developed a classification model to predict customer churn on a dataset of 3,000+ records, performing EDA and feature engineering to identify key behavioral drivers. Achieved 83% model accuracy after hyperparameter tuning, evaluated using precision, recall, and confusion matrix.

PythonScikit-learnMySQLMachine Learning
View on GitHub
03
Real-Time Product Analytics Dashboard

Built an interactive Streamlit dashboard connected to MySQL to track KPIs — user retention, session trends, and daily engagement — across 5,000+ user records. Developed a Pandas-based pipeline for data ingestion and transformation, with dynamic charts and segment-level filters.

PythonStreamlitMySQLPandasMatplotlib
View on GitHub
